title: Pepper Solo
description: A silky umami British dish featuring pepper as the star ingredient, perfect for a solo dinner that's raw-friendly.

ingredients.name: Chicken Stock (or Vegetable)
ingredients.notes: Filtered and unsalted if using vegetable stock

instructions: Place the freshly ground pepper in a mixing bowl.
Gradually add chicken stock, whisking continuously to create a silky texture.
Season with salt to taste (as the pepper is already quite strong).
Drizzle over your favorite raw vegetables or serve as a creamy dip for raw fruits.
